title: andrewyng/aisuite
friendlyTitle: andrewyng/aisuite helps switch between AI providers
summary: aisuite is a lightweight interface for calling multiple generative AI providers through a common API, reducing the friction of switching or comparing models.
friendlySummary: aisuite gives developers a simple common interface for multiple AI providers.
whyItMatters: It helps developers test prompts and applications across providers without rewriting integration code each time. That is useful when model access, pricing and quality are changing quickly.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It makes it easier to compare models or change providers without rebuilding your whole app.
